main.description: An authored story-pool item (NPC / item / lore_fragment / creature / plot_beat) — the SHARED, read-mostly content the inference-free engine dispatches from. Lives in a SERVICE repo and is the source of truth for the pool: the engine loads it with listRecords and caches it (a worker/KV cache is a disposable projection, rebuildable from this collection). The offline pregen lane WRITES these; the hot path only reads. rkey = the stable content id (e.g. 'np-keeper'). Field names mirror the engine's content_item shape so a record loads with no transform.

type.description: Which pool a feature dispatches from. 'rumor' (hoopy's world_export) is first-class: a piece of drift-spread hearsay (source_npc / spreads_via).

content.description: The renderable payload: {name, description, mechanics?, dialogue?}. Open-shaped (dialogue trees vary).

refs.description: Cross-entity references (locations/entities this content names). From hoopy's world_export; strong signal for the spine's embeddings match.

revelation_hint.description: Author's hint about what this reveals. Carried from world_export; informational + a spine signal.

produces.description: Declared producers, e.g. { sets: ['flag.x'] } — the facts this entity fires. gates.js reads these as first-class producers for orphan-quest reachability.

trigger_conditions.description: plot_beat: { flags, npcs_encountered } that fire the beat.

revelation_tier.description: Hard tier gate: a player never sees content above their revelation_tier. The Tabard bible's ladders are 1..5 (Ordinary→Curve→Vessel→Approach→Purpose); the old 1..3 clamp collapsed the back half of the chapter (v094 C2).

tags.description: World/role tags. The role→tag bridge biases dispatch toward a resident's econ role.

requires.description: Gate blob {facts, items, min_rep} — the reactive layer. Empty/absent = always available.

status.description: Retired items stay bound to existing placements but never re-dispatch.

lane.description: PROVENANCE (the pool is totally filterable). 'spine' = the shared authored/seeded canon in the service repo; 'sidequest' = a player's live-generated personal arc, frozen to their own repo. A filter projection lets the engine load spine-only, drop-experimental, or this-player-only views — so a swappable model's output stays cleanly separable and rippable. Absent ⇒ treated as 'spine' (back-compat with pre-v096 records).

provider.description: PROVENANCE: which generator authored this — 'authored' (human), 'gemini-2.5-flash', 'local:<model>' (huwupy's playground), etc. Filterable so experimental local-model content can be excluded wholesale.

genState.description: PROVENANCE: a compact digest of the game-state / chunk-characteristics vector that STEERED this generation (the embeddings-match key huwupy's spine retrieves on). Empty for hand-authored content.
